tEn: Dynamic Graph CNN for Learning on Point Clouds
tZh: 动态图卷积网络用于点云学习
sEn: EdgeConv captures local neighborhood information and semantic characteristics over long distances in point clouds.
sZh: EdgeConv能够捕捉点云中的局部邻域信息以及长距离语义特征。
absEn: Point clouds provide a flexible geometric representation suitable for countless applications in computer graphics; they also comprise the raw output of most 3D data acquisition devices. While hand-designed features on point clouds have long been proposed in graphics and vision, however, the recent overwhelming success of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for image analysis suggests the value of adapting insight from CNN to the point cloud world. Point clouds inherently lack topological information so designing a model to recover topology can enrich the representation power of point clouds. To this end, we propose a new neural network module dubbed EdgeConv suitable for CNN-based high-level tasks on point clouds including classification and segmentation. EdgeConv acts on graphs dynamically computed in each layer of the network. It is differentiable and can be plugged into existing architectures. Compared to existing modules operating in extrinsic space or treating each point independently, EdgeConv has several appealing properties: It incorporates local neighborhood information; it can be stacked applied to learn global shape properties; and in multi-layer systems affinity in feature space captures semantic characteristics over potentially long distances in the original embedding. We show the performance of our model on standard benchmarks including ModelNet40, ShapeNetPart, and S3DIS.
absZh: 点云提供了一种灵活的几何表示，适用于计算机图形学中的无数应用；它们也是大多数3D数据采集设备的原始输出。尽管在图形学和视觉中早已提出了点云上的手工设计特征，但最近卷积神经网络在图像分析中的巨大成功表明，将CNN的见解适应到点云世界是有价值的。点云本质上缺乏拓扑信息，因此设计一个模型来恢复拓扑可以丰富点云的表示能力。为此，我们提出了一个新的神经网络模块，称为EdgeConv，适用于基于CNN的点云高级任务，包括分类和分割。EdgeConv作用于网络中每层动态计算的图上。它是可微的，可以插入到现有架构中。与在外部空间中操作或独立处理每个点的现有模块相比，EdgeConv具有几个吸引人的特性：它结合了局部邻域信息；它可以堆叠应用以学习全局形状属性；在多层级系统中，特征空间中的亲和性捕获了原始嵌入中可能长距离的语义特征。我们在标准基准测试（包括ModelNet40、ShapeNetPart和S3DIS）上展示了我们模型的性能。

contrib.en: Proposes EdgeConv, a novel neural network module for point clouds that captures local geometric structure while maintaining permutation invariance.
contrib.zh: 提出EdgeConv，一种新颖的点云神经网络模块，在保持置换不变性的同时捕获局部几何结构。

contrib.en: Introduces dynamic graph updates, where the k-NN graph is recomputed in each layer based on feature space, enabling non-local semantic grouping.
contrib.zh: 引入动态图更新，每层基于特征空间重新计算k近邻图，实现非局部语义分组。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that EdgeConv can be integrated into existing architectures like PointNet to improve performance on classification and segmentation.
contrib.zh: 证明EdgeConv可集成到PointNet等现有架构中，提升分类和分割性能。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on ModelNet40, ShapeNetPart, and S3DIS benchmarks with efficient computation.
contrib.zh: 在ModelNet40、ShapeNetPart和S3DIS基准上取得最先进结果，且计算高效。

contrib.en: Provides theoretical analysis showing EdgeConv subsumes PointNet and graph CNNs as special cases.
contrib.zh: 提供理论分析，表明EdgeConv将PointNet和图CNN作为特例包含在内。

contrib.en: Releases code to facilitate reproducibility and future research.
contrib.zh: 发布代码以促进可重复性和未来研究。

limits.en: Performance degrades with large k in k-NN due to Euclidean distance failing to approximate geodesic distance.
limits.zh: k近邻中k值过大时性能下降，因欧氏距离无法近似测地距离。

limits.en: Model robustness drops significantly when fewer than 512 points are used.
limits.zh: 当点数少于512时，模型鲁棒性显著下降。

limits.en: Dynamic graph computation adds computational overhead compared to fixed-graph methods.
limits.zh: 与固定图方法相比，动态图计算增加了计算开销。

limits.en: EdgeConv only considers pairwise relationships, not higher-order point tuples.
limits.zh: EdgeConv仅考虑成对关系，未涉及高阶点元组。

limits.en: The method is evaluated only on 3D point clouds; applicability to abstract point clouds is not explored.
limits.zh: 该方法仅在3D点云上评估，未探索对抽象点云的适用性。

items.en: Point clouds provide a flexible geometric representation suitable for countless applications in computer graphics; they also comprise the raw output of most 3D data acquisition devices. While hand-designed features on point clouds have long been proposed in graphics and vision, however, the recent overwhelming success of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for image analysis suggests the value of adapting insight from CNN to the point cloud world. Point clouds inherently lack topological information so designing a model to recover topology can enrich the representation power of point clouds. To this end, we propose a new neural network module dubbed EdgeConv suitable for CNN-based high-level tasks on point clouds including classification and segmentation. EdgeConv acts on graphs dynamically computed in each layer of the network. It is differentiable and can be plugged into existing architectures. Compared to existing modules operating in extrinsic space or treating each point independently, EdgeConv has several appealing properties: It incorporates local neighborhood information; it can be stacked applied to learn global shape properties; and in multi-layer systems affinity in feature space captures semantic characteristics over potentially long distances in the original embedding. We show the performance of our model on standard benchmarks including ModelNet40, ShapeNetPart, and S3DIS.
items.zh: 点云提供了一种灵活的几何表示，适用于计算机图形学中的无数应用；它们也是大多数3D数据采集设备的原始输出。尽管长期以来在图形学和视觉中提出了基于点云的手工设计特征，然而，最近卷积神经网络（CNN）在图像分析中的巨大成功表明，将CNN的见解适应到点云世界是有价值的。点云本质上缺乏拓扑信息，因此设计一个模型来恢复拓扑可以丰富点云的表示能力。为此，我们提出了一个新的神经网络模块，称为EdgeConv，适用于基于CNN的点云高级任务，包括分类和分割。EdgeConv作用于网络每一层动态计算的图上。它是可微的，并且可以插入到现有架构中。与在外部空间中操作或独立处理每个点的现有模块相比，EdgeConv具有几个吸引人的特性：它结合了局部邻域信息；它可以堆叠应用以学习全局形状属性；在多层级系统中，特征空间中的亲和性捕获了原始嵌入中可能长距离的语义特征。我们在标准基准测试（包括ModelNet40、ShapeNetPart和S3DIS）上展示了我们模型的性能。

items.capEn: Figure 1. Point cloud segmentation using the proposed neural network. Bottom: schematic neural network architecture. Top: Structure of the feature spaces produced at different layers of the network, visualized as the distance from the red point to all the rest of the points (shown left-to-right are the input and layers 1-3; rightmost figure shows the resulting segmentation). Observe how the feature space structure in deeper layers captures semantically similar structures such as wings, fuselage, or turbines, despite a large distance between them in the original input space.
items.capZh: 图1. 使用所提出的神经网络进行点云分割。底部：示意图神经网络架构。顶部：网络不同层产生的特征空间结构，可视化为从红点到所有其他点的距离（从左到右依次是输入和层1-3；最右侧图显示最终分割结果）。注意深层特征空间结构如何捕获语义相似的结构，如机翼、机身或涡轮，尽管它们在原始输入空间中距离很大。

items.en: Point clouds, or scattered collections of points in 2D or 3D, are arguably the simplest shape representation; they also comprise the output of 3D sensing technology including LiDAR scanners and stereo reconstruction. With the advent of fast 3D point cloud acquisition, recent pipelines for graphics and vision often process point clouds directly, bypassing expensive mesh reconstruction or denoising due to efficiency considerations or instability of these techniques in the presence of noise. A few of the many recent applications of point cloud processing and analysis include indoor navigation [Zhu et al., 2017], self-driving vehicles [Qi et al., 2017a; Wang et al., 2018b; Liang et al., 2018], robotics [Rusu et al., 2008b], and shape synthesis and modeling [Golovinskiy et al., 2009; Guerrero et al., 2018].
items.zh: 点云，即2D或3D中点的散乱集合，可以说是最简单的形状表示；它们也是3D传感技术（包括LiDAR扫描仪和立体重建）的输出。随着快速3D点云采集的出现，最近的图形学和视觉流水线通常直接处理点云，由于效率考虑或这些技术在噪声存在下的不稳定性，跳过了昂贵的网格重建或去噪。点云处理和分析的许多近期应用包括室内导航[Zhu等人，2017]、自动驾驶车辆[Qi等人，2017a；Wang等人，2018b；Liang等人，2018]、机器人技术[Rusu等人，2008b]以及形状合成和建模[Golovinskiy等人，2009；Guerrero等人，2018]。

items.en: These modern applications demand high-level processing of point clouds. Rather than identifying salient geometric features like corners and edges, recent algorithms search for semantic cues and affordances. These features do not fit cleanly into the frameworks of computational or differential geometry and typically require learning-based approaches that derive relevant information through statistical analysis of labeled or unlabeled datasets.
items.zh: 这些现代应用要求对点云进行高级处理。最近的算法不是识别显著的几何特征（如角和边），而是寻找语义线索和可供性。这些特征并不完全适合计算几何或微分几何的框架，通常需要基于学习的方法，通过标记或未标记数据集的统计分析来推导相关信息。

items.en: In this paper, we primarily consider point cloud classification and segmentation, two model tasks in point cloud processing. Traditional methods for solving these problems employ handcrafted features to capture geometric properties of point clouds [Lu et al., 2014; Rusu et al., 2009, 2008a]. More recently, the success of deep neural networks for image processing has motivated a data-driven approach to learning features on point clouds. Deep point cloud processing and analysis methods are developing rapidly and outperform traditional approaches in various tasks [Chang et al., 2015].
items.zh: 在本文中，我们主要考虑点云分类和分割，这是点云处理中的两个模型任务。解决这些问题的传统方法使用手工特征来捕获点云的几何属性[Lu等人，2014；Rusu等人，2009，2008a]。最近，深度神经网络在图像处理中的成功推动了数据驱动的方法来学习点云上的特征。深度点云处理和分析方法正在快速发展，并在各种任务中优于传统方法[Chang等人，2015]。

items.en: Adaptation of deep learning to point cloud data, however, is far from straightforward. Most critically, standard deep neural network models require input data with regular structure, while point clouds are fundamentally irregular: Point positions are continuously distributed in the space, and any permutation of their ordering does not change the spatial distribution. One common approach to process point cloud data using deep learning models is to first convert raw point cloud data into a volumetric representation, namely a 3D grid [Maturana and Scherer, 2015; Wu et al., 2015]. This approach, however, usually introduces quantization artifacts and excessive memory usage, making it difficult to go to capture high-resolution or fine-grained features.
items.zh: 然而，深度学习对点云数据的适应远非直接。最关键的是，标准深度神经网络模型要求输入数据具有规则结构，而点云本质上是不规则的：点的位置在空间中连续分布，任何顺序的排列都不会改变空间分布。使用深度学习模型处理点云数据的一种常见方法是首先将原始点云数据转换为体素表示，即3D网格[Maturana和Scherer，2015；Wu等人，2015]。然而，这种方法通常会引入量化伪影和过多的内存使用，使其难以捕获高分辨率或细粒度特征。

items.en: State-of-the-art deep neural networks are designed specifically to handle the irregularity of point clouds, directly manipulating raw point cloud data rather than passing to an intermediate regular representation. This approach was pioneered by PointNet [Qi et al., 2017b], which achieves permutation invariance of points by operating on each point independently and subsequently applying a symmetric function to accumulate features. Various extensions of PointNet consider neighborhoods of points rather than acting on each independently [Qi et al., 2017c; Shen et al., 2017]; these allow the network to exploit local features, improving upon performance of the basic model. These techniques largely treat points independently at local scale to maintain permutation invariance. This independence, however, neglects the geometric relationships among points, presenting a fundamental limitation that cannot capture local features.
items.zh: 最先进的深度神经网络专门设计用于处理点云的不规则性，直接操作原始点云数据，而不是传递到中间规则表示。这种方法由PointNet[Qi等人，2017b]开创，它通过独立操作每个点并随后应用对称函数来累积特征，实现了点的置换不变性。PointNet的各种扩展考虑点的邻域而不是独立操作每个点[Qi等人，2017c；Shen等人，2017]；这些允许网络利用局部特征，提高了基本模型的性能。这些技术主要在局部尺度上独立处理点以保持置换不变性。然而，这种独立性忽略了点之间的几何关系，呈现出一个基本限制，无法捕获局部特征。

items.en: To address these drawbacks, we propose a novel simple operation, called EdgeConv, which captures local geometric structure while maintaining permutation invariance. Instead of generating point features directly from their embeddings, EdgeConv generates edge features that describe the relationships between a point and its neighbors. EdgeConv is designed to be invariant to the ordering of neighbors, and thus is permutation invariant. Because EdgeConv explicitly constructs a local graph and learns the embeddings for the edges, the model is capable of grouping points both in Euclidean space and in semantic space.
items.zh: 为了解决这些缺点，我们提出了一种新颖的简单操作，称为EdgeConv，它在保持置换不变性的同时捕获局部几何结构。EdgeConv不是直接从点的嵌入生成点特征，而是生成描述点与其邻居之间关系的边特征。EdgeConv被设计为对邻居的顺序不变，因此是置换不变的。由于EdgeConv显式地构建局部图并学习边的嵌入，该模型能够在欧几里得空间和语义空间中对点进行分组。

items.en: EdgeConv is easy to implement and integrate into existing deep learning models to improve their performance. In our experiments, we integrate EdgeConv into the basic version of PointNet without using any feature transformation. We show the resulting network achieves state-of-the-art performance on several datasets, most notably ModelNet40 and S3DIS for classification and segmentation.
items.zh: EdgeConv易于实现并集成到现有深度学习模型中以提高其性能。在我们的实验中，我们将EdgeConv集成到PointNet的基本版本中，而不使用任何特征变换。我们展示了所得网络在多个数据集上实现了最先进的性能，最显著的是ModelNet40和S3DIS的分类和分割。

items.en: We summarize the key contributions of our work as follows:
items.zh: 我们将工作的主要贡献总结如下：

items.en: We present a novel operation for learning from point clouds, EdgeConv, to better capture local geometric features of point clouds while still maintaining permutation invariance.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种从点云学习的新操作EdgeConv，以更好地捕获点云的局部几何特征，同时保持置换不变性。

items.en: We show the model can learn to semantically group points by dynamically updating a graph of relationships from layer to layer.
items.zh: 我们展示了该模型可以通过逐层动态更新关系图来学习语义分组点。

items.en: We demonstrate that EdgeConv can be integrated into multiple existing pipelines for point cloud processing.
items.zh: 我们证明了EdgeConv可以集成到多个现有的点云处理流水线中。

items.en: We present extensive analysis and testing of EdgeConv and show that it achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmark datasets.
items.zh: 我们对EdgeConv进行了广泛的分析和测试，并展示了它在基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

items.en: We release our code to facilitate reproducibility and future research. 111https://github.com/WangYueFt/dgcnn
items.zh: 我们发布代码以促进可重复性和未来研究。111https://github.com/WangYueFt/dgcnn

items.en: Various tasks in geometric data processing and analysis—including segmentation, classification, and matching—require some notion of local similarity between shapes. Traditionally, this similarity is established by constructing feature descriptors that capture local geometric structure. Countless papers in computer vision and graphics propose local feature descriptors for point clouds suitable for different problems and data structures. A comprehensive overview of hand-designed point features is out of the scope of this paper, but we refer the reader to [Van Kaick et al., 2011; Guo et al., 2014; Biasotti et al., 2016] for discussion.
items.zh: 几何数据处理和分析中的各种任务——包括分割、分类和匹配——需要形状之间的某种局部相似性概念。传统上，这种相似性通过构建捕获局部几何结构的特征描述符来建立。计算机视觉和图形学中有无数论文提出了适用于不同问题和数据结构的点云局部特征描述符。手工点特征的全面概述超出了本文的范围，但我们建议读者参考[Van Kaick等人，2011；Guo等人，2014；Biasotti等人，2016]的讨论。

items.en: Broadly speaking, one can distinguish between extrinsic and intrinsic descriptors. Extrinsic descriptors usually are derived from the coordinates of the shape in 3D space and includes classical methods like shape context [Belongie et al., 2001], spin images [Johnson and Hebert, 1999], integral features [Manay et al., 2006], distance-based descriptors [Ling and Jacobs, 2007], point feature histograms [Rusu et al., 2008a, 2009], and normal histograms [Tombari et al., 2011], to name a few. Intrinsic descriptors treat the 3D shape as a manifold whose metric structure is discretized as a mesh or graph; quantities expressed in terms of the metric are invariant to isometric deformation. Representatives of this class include spectral descriptors such as global point signatures [Rustamov, 2007], the heat and wave kernel signatures [Sun et al., 2009; Aubry et al., 2011], and variants [Bronstein and Kokkinos, 2010]. Most recently, several approaches wrap machine learning schemes around standard descriptors [Guo et al., 2014; Shah et al., 2013].
items.zh: 广义上，可以区分外在和内在描述符。外在描述符通常源自形状在3D空间中的坐标，包括经典方法如形状上下文[Belongie等人，2001]、旋转图像[Johnson和Hebert，1999]、积分特征[Manay等人，2006]、基于距离的描述符[Ling和Jacobs，2007]、点特征直方图[Rusu等人，2008a，2009]和法线直方图[Tombari等人，2011]等。内在描述符将3D形状视为一个流形，其度量结构离散化为网格或图；以度量表示的量在等距变形下不变。这类方法的代表包括谱描述符，如全局点签名[Rustamov，2007]、热核和波核签名[Sun等人，2009；Aubry等人，2011]及其变体[Bronstein和Kokkinos，2010]。最近，几种方法将机器学习方案包裹在标准描述符周围[Guo等人，2014；Shah等人，2013]。

items.en: Following the breakthrough results of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in vision [LeCun et al., 1989; Krizhevsky et al., 2012], there has been strong interest to adapt such methods to geometric data. Unlike images, geometry usually does not have an underlying grid, requiring new building blocks replacing convolution and pooling or adaptation to a grid structure.
items.zh: 随着卷积神经网络（CNN）在视觉中的突破性结果[LeCun等人，1989；Krizhevsky等人，2012]，人们强烈希望将这些方法适应到几何数据。与图像不同，几何通常没有底层网格，需要新的构建块来替代卷积和池化，或适应网格结构。

items.en: As a simple way to overcome this issue, view-based [Su et al., 2015; Wei et al., 2016] and volumetric representations [Maturana and Scherer, 2015; Wu et al., 2015; Klokov and Lempitsky, 2017; Tatarchenko et al., 2017]—or their combination [Qi et al., 2016]—“place” geometric data onto a grid. More recently, PointNet [Qi et al., 2017b, c] exemplifies a broad class of deep learning architectures on non-Euclidean data (graphs and manifolds) termed geometric deep learning [Bronstein et al., 2017]. These date back to early methods to construct neural networks on graphs [Scarselli et al., 2009], recently improved with gated recurrent units [Li et al., 2016] and neural message passing [Gilmer et al., 2017]. Bruna et al. [2013] and Henaff et al. [2015] generalized convolution to graphs via the Laplacian eigenvectors [Shuman et al., 2013]. Computational drawbacks of this foundational approach were alleviated in follow-up works using polynomial [Defferrard et al., 2016; Kipf and Welling, 2017; Monti et al., 2017b, 2018], or rational [Levie et al., 2017] spectral filters that avoid Laplacian eigendecomposition and guarantee localization. An alternative definition of non-Euclidean convolution employs spatial rather than spectral filters. The Geodesic CNN (GCNN) is a deep CNN on meshes generalizing the notion of patches using local intrinsic parameterization [Masci et al., 2015]. Its key advantage over spectral approaches is better generalization as well as a simple way of constructing directional filters. Follow-up work proposed different local charting techniques using anisotropic diffusion [Boscaini et al., 2016] or Gaussian mixture models [Veličković et al., 2017; Monti et al., 2017a]. In [Litany et al., 2017b; Halimi et al., 2018], a differentiable functional map [Ovsjanikov et al., 2012] layer was incorporated into a geometric deep neural network, allowing to do intrinsic structured prediction of correspondence between nonrigid shapes.
items.zh: 作为克服这一问题的简单方法，基于视图[Su等人，2015；Wei等人，2016]和体素表示[Maturana和Scherer，2015；Wu等人，2015；Klokov和Lempitsky，2017；Tatarchenko等人，2017]——或它们的组合[Qi等人，2016]——将几何数据“放置”到网格上。最近，PointNet[Qi等人，2017b，c]代表了非欧几里得数据（图和流形）上的一类广泛深度学习架构，称为几何深度学习[Bronstein等人，2017]。这些可以追溯到在图上构建神经网络的早期方法[Scarselli等人，2009]，最近通过门控循环单元[Li等人，2016]和神经消息传递[Gilmer等人，2017]得到改进。Bruna等人[2013]和Henaff等人[2015]通过拉普拉斯特征向量将卷积推广到图[Shuman等人，2013]。这种基础方法的计算缺点在后续工作中通过使用多项式[Defferrard等人，2016；Kipf和Welling，2017；Monti等人，2017b，2018]或有理[Levie等人，2017]谱滤波器得到缓解，这些滤波器避免了拉普拉斯特征分解并保证了局部性。非欧几里得卷积的另一种定义使用空间滤波器而不是谱滤波器。测地线CNN（GCNN）是一种在网格上的深度CNN，通过使用局部内在参数化推广了块的概念[Masci等人，2015]。与谱方法相比，其主要优势在于更好的泛化性以及构建方向滤波器的简单方法。后续工作提出了使用各向异性扩散[Boscaini等人，2016]或高斯混合模型[Veličković等人，2017；Monti等人，2017a]的不同局部图表技术。在[Litany等人，2017b；Halimi等人，2018]中，可微函数映射[Ovsjanikov等人，2012]层被纳入几何深度神经网络，允许对非刚性形状之间的对应关系进行内在结构化预测。

items.en: The last class of geometric deep learning approaches attempts to pull back a convolution operation by embedding the shape into a domain with shift-invariant structure such as the sphere [Sinha et al., 2016], torus [Maron et al., 2017], plane [Ezuz et al., 2017], sparse network lattice [Su et al., 2018], or spline [Fey et al., 2018].
items.zh: 几何深度学习方法的最后一类尝试通过将形状嵌入到具有平移不变结构的域（如球面 [Sinha et al., 2016]、环面 [Maron et al., 2017]、平面 [Ezuz et al., 2017]、稀疏网络格点 [Su et al., 2018] 或样条 [Fey et al., 2018]）中来拉回卷积操作。

items.en: Finally, we should mention geometric generative models, which attempt to generalize models such as autoencoders, variational autoencoders (VAE) [Kingma and Welling, 2013], and generative adversarial networks (GAN) [Goodfellow et al., 2014] to the non-Euclidean setting. One of the fundamental differences between these two settings is the lack of canonical order between the input and the output vertices, thus requiring an input-output correspondence problem to be solved. In 3D mesh generation, it is commonly assumed that the mesh is given and its vertices are canonically ordered; the generation problem thus amounts only to determining the embedding of the mesh vertices. Kostrikov et al. [2017] proposed SurfaceNets based on the extrinsic Dirac operator for this task. Litany et al. [2017a] introduced the intrinsic VAE for meshes and applied it to shape completion; a similar architecture was used by Ranjan et al. [2018] for 3D face synthesis. For point clouds, multiple generative architectures have been proposed [Fan et al., 2017; Li et al., 2018b; Yang et al., 2018].
items.zh: 最后，我们应提及几何生成模型，它们试图将自编码器、变分自编码器（VAE）[Kingma and Welling, 2013] 和生成对抗网络（GAN）[Goodfellow et al., 2014] 等模型推广到非欧几里得设置。这两种设置之间的一个基本区别是输入和输出顶点之间缺乏规范顺序，因此需要解决输入-输出对应问题。在3D网格生成中，通常假设网格已给定且其顶点按规范顺序排列；因此生成问题仅在于确定网格顶点的嵌入。Kostrikov等人 [2017] 为此任务提出了基于外在Dirac算子的SurfaceNets。Litany等人 [2017a] 引入了网格的内在VAE并将其应用于形状补全；Ranjan等人 [2018] 使用了类似架构进行3D人脸合成。对于点云，已有多种生成架构被提出 [Fan et al., 2017; Li et al., 2018b; Yang et al., 2018]。

items.capEn: Figure 3. Model architectures: The model architectures used for classification (top branch) and segmentation (bottom branch). The classification model takes as input n𝑛n points, calculates an edge feature set of size k𝑘k for each point at an EdgeConv layer, and aggregates features within each set to compute EdgeConv responses for corresponding points. The output features of the last EdgeConv layer are aggregated globally to form an 1​D1𝐷1D global descriptor, which is used to generate classification scores for c𝑐c classes. The segmentation model extends the classification model by concatenating the 1​D1𝐷1D global descriptor and all the EdgeConv outputs (serving as local descriptors) for each point. It outputs per-point classification scores for p𝑝p semantic labels. ⊕direct-sum\oplus: concatenation. Point cloud transform block: The point cloud transform block is designed to align an input point set to a canonical space by applying an estimated 3×3333\times 3 matrix. To estimate the 3×3333\times 3 matrix, a tensor concatenating the coordinates of each point and the coordinate differences between its k𝑘k neighboring points is used. EdgeConv block: The EdgeConv block takes as input a tensor of shape n×f𝑛𝑓n\times f, computes edge features for each point by applying a multi-layer perceptron (mlp) with the number of layer neurons defined as {a1,a2,…,an}subscript𝑎1subscript𝑎2…subscript𝑎𝑛\{a_{1},a_{2},...,a_{n}\}, and generates a tensor of shape n×an𝑛subscript𝑎𝑛n\times a_{n} after pooling among neighboring edge features.
items.capZh: 图3. 模型架构：用于分类（上分支）和分割（下分支）的模型架构。分类模型以n个点作为输入，在EdgeConv层为每个点计算大小为k的边特征集，并在每个集合内聚合特征以计算对应点的EdgeConv响应。最后一个EdgeConv层的输出特征被全局聚合，形成一维全局描述符，用于生成c个类别的分类分数。分割模型通过将一维全局描述符与每个点的所有EdgeConv输出（作为局部描述符）拼接来扩展分类模型。它为p个语义标签输出逐点分类分数。⊕：拼接。点云变换块：点云变换块旨在通过应用估计的3×3矩阵将输入点集对齐到规范空间。为估计3×3矩阵，使用一个张量，该张量由每个点的坐标及其k个邻域点的坐标差拼接而成。EdgeConv块：EdgeConv块接收形状为n×f的张量作为输入，通过应用多层感知机（MLP）（层神经元数量定义为{a1,a2,…,an}）为每个点计算边特征，并在邻域边特征池化后生成形状为n×an的张量。

items.en: We propose an approach inspired by PointNet and convolution operations. Instead of working on individual points like PointNet, however, we exploit local geometric structures by constructing a local neighborhood graph and applying convolution-like operations on the edges connecting neighboring pairs of points, in the spirit of graph neural networks. We show in the following that such an operation, dubbed edge convolution (EdgeConv), has properties lying between translation-invariance and non-locality.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种受PointNet和卷积操作启发的方法。然而，与PointNet在单个点上操作不同，我们通过构建局部邻域图并在连接相邻点对的边上应用类似卷积的操作（类似于图神经网络）来利用局部几何结构。我们将在下文中展示，这种称为边卷积（EdgeConv）的操作具有介于平移不变性和非局部性之间的性质。

items.en: Unlike graph CNNs, our graph is not fixed but rather is dynamically updated after each layer of the network. That is, the set of k𝑘k-nearest neighbors of a point changes from layer to layer of the network and is computed from the sequence of embeddings. Proximity in feature space differs from proximity in the input, leading to nonlocal diffusion of information throughout the point cloud. As a connection to existing work, Non-local Neural Networks [Wang et al., 2018a] explored similar ideas in the video recognition field, and follow-up work by Xie et al. [2018] proposed using non-local blocks to denoise feature maps to defend against adversarial attacks.
items.zh: 与图CNN不同，我们的图不是固定的，而是在网络的每一层之后动态更新。也就是说，一个点的k近邻集在网络层与层之间发生变化，并从嵌入序列中计算得出。特征空间中的邻近性与输入中的邻近性不同，导致信息在整个点云中非局部扩散。与现有工作的联系：非局部神经网络 [Wang et al., 2018a] 在视频识别领域探索了类似思想，后续工作Xie等人 [2018] 提出使用非局部块对特征图进行去噪以防御对抗攻击。

items.en: Consider an F𝐹F-dimensional point cloud with n𝑛n points, denoted by 𝐗={𝐱1,…,𝐱n}⊆ℝF𝐗subscript𝐱1…subscript𝐱𝑛superscriptℝ𝐹\mathbf{X}=\{\mathbf{x}_{1},\ldots,\mathbf{x}_{n}\}\subseteq\mathbb{R}^{F}. Our experiments suggest that it is beneficial to recompute the graph using nearest neighbors in the feature space produced by each layer. This is a crucial distinction of our method from graph CNNs working on a fixed input graph. Such a dynamic graph update is the reason for the name of our architecture, the Dynamic Graph CNN (DGCNN). With dynamic graph updates, the receptive field is as large as the diameter of the point cloud, while being sparse.
items.zh: 我们的实验表明，使用每层特征空间中的最近邻重新计算图是有益的。这是我们的方法与在固定输入图上工作的图CNN的关键区别。这种动态图更新是我们架构名称——动态图CNN（DGCNN）的由来。通过动态图更新，感受野与点云直径一样大，同时保持稀疏性。

items.en: At each layer we have a different graph 𝒢(l)=(𝒱(l),ℰ(l))superscript𝒢𝑙superscript𝒱𝑙superscriptℰ𝑙\mathcal{G}^{(l)}=(\mathcal{V}^{(l)},\mathcal{E}^{(l)}), where the l𝑙l-th layer edges are of the form (i,ji​1),…,(i,ji​kl)𝑖subscript𝑗𝑖1…𝑖subscript𝑗𝑖subscript𝑘𝑙(i,j_{i1}),\ldots,(i,j_{ik_{l}}) such that 𝐱ji​1(l),…,xji​kl(l)subscriptsuperscript𝐱𝑙subscript𝑗𝑖1…subscriptsuperscript𝑥𝑙subscript𝑗𝑖subscript𝑘𝑙\mathbf{x}^{(l)}_{j_{i1}},\ldots,x^{(l)}_{j_{ik_{l}}} are the klsubscript𝑘𝑙k_{l} points closest to 𝐱i(l)subscriptsuperscript𝐱𝑙𝑖\mathbf{x}^{(l)}_{i}. Put differently, our architecture learns how to construct the graph 𝒢𝒢\mathcal{G} used in each layer rather than taking it as a fixed constant constructed before the network is evaluated. In our implementation, we compute a pairwise distance matrix in feature space and then take the closest k𝑘k points for each single point.
items.zh: 在每一层，我们都有一个不同的图 𝒢^(l) = (𝒱^(l), ℰ^(l))，其中第 l 层的边形式为 (i, j_{i1}), …, (i, j_{ik_l})，使得 𝐱_{j_{i1}}^(l), …, x_{j_{ik_l}}^(l) 是距离 𝐱_i^(l) 最近的 k_l 个点。换句话说，我们的架构学习如何构建每一层中使用的图 𝒢，而不是将其视为网络评估前构建的固定常数。在我们的实现中，我们在特征空间中计算成对距离矩阵，然后为每个点取最近的 k 个点。

items.capEn: Figure 4. Structure of the feature spaces produced at different stages of our shape classification neural network architecture, visualized as the distance between the red point to the rest of the points. For each set, Left: Euclidean distance in the input ℝ3superscriptℝ3\mathbb{R}^{3} space; Middle: Distance after the point cloud transform stage, amounting to a global transformation of the shape; Right: Distance in the feature space of the last layer. Observe how in the feature space of deeper layers semantically similar structures such as shelves of a bookshelf or legs of a table are brought close together, although they are distant in the original space.

In this case, however, the model reduces to recognizing an object based on an unordered set of patches, ignoring the positions and orientations of patches. With both 𝐱j−𝐱isubscript𝐱𝑗subscript𝐱𝑖\mathbf{x}_{j}-\mathbf{x}_{i} and 𝐱isubscript𝐱𝑖\mathbf{x}_{i} as input, the model takes account into the local geometry of patches while keeping global shape information.
items.zh: 如果我们仅考虑 𝐱_j - 𝐱_i，通过取 ϕ_m = 𝟎，那么算子完全平移不变。在这种情况下，模型退化为基于无序的 patch 集合识别物体，忽略了 patch 的位置和方向。同时以 𝐱_j - 𝐱_i 和 𝐱_i 作为输入时，模型在保留全局形状信息的同时考虑了 patch 的局部几何。

items.en: DGCNN is related to two classes of approaches, PointNet and graph CNNs, which we show to be particular settings of our method. We summarize different methods in Table 1.
items.zh: DGCNN 与两类方法相关：PointNet 和图卷积网络，我们证明它们是我们的方法的特例。我们在表 1 中总结了不同方法。

items.en: PointNet is a special case of our method with k=1𝑘1k=1, yielding a graph with an empty edge set ℰ=∅ℰ\mathcal{E}=\varnothing. The edge function used in PointNet is h𝚯​(𝐱i,𝐱j)=h𝚯​(𝐱i)subscriptℎ𝚯subscript𝐱𝑖subscript𝐱𝑗subscriptℎ𝚯subscript𝐱𝑖h_{\boldsymbol{\Theta}}(\mathbf{x}_{i},\mathbf{x}_{j})=h_{\boldsymbol{\Theta}}(\mathbf{x}_{i}), which considers global but not local geometry. PointNet++ tries to account for local structure by applying PointNet in a local manner. In our parlance, PointNet++ first constructs the graph according to the Euclidean distances between the points, and in each layer applies a graph coarsening operation. For each layer, some points are selected using farthest point sampling (FPS); only the selected points are preserved while others are directly discarded after this layer. In this way, the graph becomes smaller after the operation applied on each layer. In contrast to DGCNN, PointNet++ computes pairwise distances using point input coordinates, and hence their graphs are fixed during training. The edge function used by PointNet++ is h𝚯​(𝐱i,𝐱j)=h𝚯​(𝐱j)subscriptℎ𝚯subscript𝐱𝑖subscript𝐱𝑗subscriptℎ𝚯subscript𝐱𝑗h_{\boldsymbol{\Theta}}(\mathbf{x}_{i},\mathbf{x}_{j})=h_{\boldsymbol{\Theta}}(\mathbf{x}_{j}), and the aggregation operation is also a max\max.
items.zh: PointNet 是我们的方法在 k=1 时的特例，产生一个边集为空的图 ℰ = ∅。PointNet 中使用的边函数是 h_𝚯(𝐱_i, 𝐱_j) = h_𝚯(𝐱_i)，它考虑全局几何而非局部几何。PointNet++ 试图通过以局部方式应用 PointNet 来考虑局部结构。用我们的术语来说，PointNet++ 首先根据点之间的欧氏距离构建图，并在每一层应用图粗化操作。对于每一层，使用最远点采样（FPS）选择一些点；只有被选中的点被保留，其他点在该层后直接丢弃。这样，图在每层应用操作后变得更小。与 DGCNN 相比，PointNet++ 使用点输入坐标计算成对距离，因此它们的图在训练期间是固定的。PointNet++ 使用的边函数是 h_𝚯(𝐱_i, 𝐱_j) = h_𝚯(𝐱_j)，聚合操作也是 max。

items.en: Among graph CNNs, MoNet [Monti et al., 2017a], ECC [Simonovsky and Komodakis, 2017], Graph Attention Networks [Veličković et al., 2017], and the concurrent work [Atzmon et al., 2018] are the most related approaches. Their common denominator is a notion of a local patch on a graph, in which a convolution-type operation can be defined.222[Simonovsky and Komodakis, 2017; Veličković et al., 2017] can be considered instances of [Monti et al., 2017a], with the difference that the weights are constructed employing features from adjacent nodes instead of graph structure; [Atzmon et al., 2018] is also similar except that the weighting function is hand-designed.
items.zh: 在图卷积网络中，MoNet [Monti et al., 2017a]、ECC [Simonovsky and Komodakis, 2017]、图注意力网络 [Veličković et al., 2017] 以及同期工作 [Atzmon et al., 2018] 是最相关的方法。它们的共同点是图上的局部 patch 概念，可以在其上定义卷积类型的操作。²²[Simonovsky and Komodakis, 2017; Veličković et al., 2017] 可视为 [Monti et al., 2017a] 的实例，区别在于权重是利用相邻节点的特征而非图结构构建的；[Atzmon et al., 2018] 也类似，只是加权函数是手工设计的。

items.en: Specifically, Monti et al. [2017a] use the graph structure to compute a local “pseudo-coordinate system” 𝐮𝐮\mathbf{u} in which the neighborhood vertices are represented; the convolution is then defined as an M𝑀M-component Gaussian mixture
items.zh: 具体来说，Monti et al. [2017a] 使用图结构计算局部“伪坐标系” 𝐮，其中表示邻域顶点；卷积则定义为 M 分量高斯混合

items.en: where g𝑔g is a Gaussian kernel, ⊙direct-product\odot is the elementwise (Hadamard) product, {𝒘1,…,𝒘N}subscript𝒘1…subscript𝒘𝑁\{\boldsymbol{w}_{1},\ldots,\boldsymbol{w}_{N}\} encode the learnable parameters of the Gaussians (mean and covariance), and {θ1,…,θM}subscript𝜃1…subscript𝜃𝑀\{\theta_{1},\ldots,\theta_{M}\} are the learnable filter coefficients. (11) is an instance of our general operation (1), with a particular edge function
items.zh: 其中 g 是高斯核，⊙ 是逐元素（Hadamard）乘积，{𝒘_1, …, 𝒘_N} 编码高斯核的可学习参数（均值和协方差），{θ_1, …, θ_M} 是可学习的滤波器系数。(11) 是我们一般操作 (1) 的一个实例，具有特定的边函数

items.en: and □=∑□\square=\sum. Again, their graph structure is fixed, and u𝑢u is constructed based on the degrees of nodes.
items.zh: 且 □ = ∑。同样，它们的图结构是固定的，u 基于节点的度数构建。

items.en: [Atzmon et al., 2018] can be seen as a special case of [Monti et al., 2017a] with g𝑔g as predefined Gaussian functions. Removing learnable parameters (w1,…,wN)subscript𝑤1…subscript𝑤𝑁(w_{1},\ldots,w_{N}) and constructing a dense graph from point clouds, we have
items.zh: [Atzmon et al., 2018] 可视为 [Monti et al., 2017a] 的特例，其中 g 是预定义的高斯函数。移除可学习参数 (w_1, …, w_N) 并从点云构建稠密图，我们有

items.en: where u𝑢u is the pairwise distance between 𝐱isubscript𝐱𝑖\mathbf{x}_{i} and 𝐱jsubscript𝐱𝑗\mathbf{x}_{j} in Euclidean space.
items.zh: 其中 u 是 𝐱_i 和 𝐱_j 在欧氏空间中的成对距离。

items.en: While MoNet and other graph CNNs assume a given fixed graph on which convolution-like operations are applied, to our knowledge our method is the first for which the graph changes from layer to layer and even on the same input during training when learnable parameters are updated. This way, our model not only learns how to extract local geometric features, but also how to group points in a point cloud. Figure 4 shows the distance in different feature spaces, exemplifying that the distances in deeper layers carry semantic information over long distances in the original embedding.
items.zh: 虽然 MoNet 和其他图卷积网络假设一个给定的固定图，并在其上应用类似卷积的操作，但据我们所知，我们的方法是第一个图在层与层之间变化，甚至在训练期间当可学习参数更新时对同一输入也变化的方法。这样，我们的模型不仅学习如何提取局部几何特征，还学习如何对点云中的点进行分组。图 4 显示了不同特征空间中的距离，示例说明更深层中的距离在原始嵌入中携带长距离的语义信息。

items.en: In this section, we evaluate the models constructed using EdgeConv for different tasks: classification, part segmentation, and semantic segmentation. We also visualize experimental results to illustrate key differences from previous work.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们评估使用 EdgeConv 构建的模型在不同任务上的表现：分类、部件分割和语义分割。我们还可视化实验结果以说明与先前工作的关键区别。

items.en: We evaluate our model on the ModelNet40 [Wu et al., 2015] classification task, consisting in predicting the category of a previously unseen shape. The dataset contains 12,311 meshed CAD models from 40 categories. 9,843 models are used for training and 2,468 models are for testing. We follow verbatim the experimental settings of Qi et al. [2017b]. For each model, 1,024 points are uniformly sampled from the mesh faces; the point cloud is rescaled to fit into the unit sphere. Only the (x,y,z)𝑥𝑦𝑧(x,y,z) coordinates of the sampled points are used, and the original meshes are discarded. During the training procedure, we augment the data by randomly scaling objects and perturbing the object and point locations.
items.zh: 我们在 ModelNet40 [Wu et al., 2015] 分类任务上评估我们的模型，该任务旨在预测未见过的形状的类别。数据集包含来自 40 个类别的 12,311 个网格 CAD 模型。其中 9,843 个模型用于训练，2,468 个模型用于测试。我们严格遵循 Qi et al. [2017b] 的实验设置。对于每个模型，从网格面均匀采样 1,024 个点；点云被缩放以适合单位球体。仅使用采样点的 (x, y, z) 坐标，原始网格被丢弃。在训练过程中，我们通过随机缩放物体以及扰动物体和点位置来增强数据。

items.en: The network architecture used for the classification task is shown in Figure 3 (top branch without spatial transformer network). We use four EdgeConv layers to extract geometric features. The four EdgeConv layers use three shared fully-connected layers (64(64, 646464, 128128128, 256)256). We recompute the graph based on the features of each EdgeConv layer and use the new graph for next layer. The number k𝑘k of nearest neighbors is 20 for all EdgeConv layers (for the last row in Table 2, k𝑘k is 40). Shortcut connections are included to extract multi-scale features and one shared fully-connected layer (1024)1024(1024) to aggregate multi-scale features, where we concatenate features from previous layers to get a 64+64+128+256=512 dimensional point cloud. Then, a global max/sum pooling is used to get the point cloud global feature, after which two fully-connected layers (512,256)512256(512,256) are used to transform the global feature. Dropout with keep probability of 0.5 is used in the last two fully-connected layers. All layers include LeakyReLU and batch normalization. The number k𝑘k was chosen using a validation set. We split the training data to 80% for training and 20% for validation to search the best k𝑘k. After k𝑘k is chosen, we retrain the model on the whole training data and evaluate the model on the testing data. Other hyperparameters were chosen in a similar ways.
items.zh: 用于分类任务的网络架构如图 3 所示（顶部分支，不含空间变换网络）。我们使用四个 EdgeConv 层来提取几何特征。四个 EdgeConv 层使用三个共享的全连接层（64, 64, 128, 256）。我们基于每个 EdgeConv 层的特征重新计算图，并将新图用于下一层。所有 EdgeConv 层的最近邻数量 k 为 20（对于表 2 的最后一行，k 为 40）。包含捷径连接以提取多尺度特征，以及一个共享的全连接层 (1024) 来聚合多尺度特征，其中我们拼接来自前几层的特征以获得 64+64+128+256=512 维的点云。然后，使用全局最大/求和池化获得点云全局特征，之后使用两个全连接层 (512, 256) 变换全局特征。最后两个全连接层使用保留概率为 0.5 的 Dropout。所有层都包含 LeakyReLU 和批归一化。k 值通过验证集选择。我们将训练数据按 80% 训练和 20% 验证分割以搜索最佳 k。选定 k 后，我们在整个训练数据上重新训练模型，并在测试数据上评估模型。其他超参数以类似方式选择。

items.en: We use SGD with learning rate 0.1, and we reduce the learning rate until 0.001 using cosine annealing [Loshchilov and Hutter, 2017]. The momentum for batch normalization is 0.9, and we do not use batch normalization decay. The batch size is 32 and the momentum is 0.9.
items.zh: 我们使用学习率 0.1 的 SGD，并使用余弦退火 [Loshchilov and Hutter, 2017] 将学习率降至 0.001。批归一化的动量为 0.9，我们不使用批归一化衰减。批量大小为 32，动量为 0.9。

items.en: We use the ModelNet40 [Wu et al., 2015] classification experiment to compare the complexity of our model to previous state-of-the-art. Table 3 shows that our model achieves the best tradeoff between the model complexity (number of parameters), computational complexity (measured as forward pass time), and the resulting classification accuracy.
items.zh: 我们使用 ModelNet40 [Wu et al., 2015] 分类实验来比较我们的模型与先前最先进方法的复杂度。表 3 显示，我们的模型在模型复杂度（参数数量）、计算复杂度（以前向传播时间衡量）和最终分类准确率之间实现了最佳权衡。

items.en: Our baseline model using the fixed k𝑘k-NN graph outperforms the previous state-of-the-art PointNet++ by 1.0%percent1.01.0\% accuracy, at the same time being 7 times faster. A more advanced version of our model including a dynamically-updated graph computation outperforms PointNet++, PCNN by 2.2%percent2.22.2\% and 0.6%percent0.60.6\% respectively, while being much more efficient. The number of points in each experiment is also 1024 in this section.
items.zh: 使用固定 k-NN 图的基线模型以 7 倍的速度优势，准确率比先前最先进的 PointNet++ 高出 1.0%。包含动态更新图的更高级版本模型分别比 PointNet++ 和 PCNN 高出 2.2% 和 0.6%，同时效率更高。本节中每个实验的点数也是 1024。

items.en: We also experiment with various settings of our model on the ModelNet40 [Wu et al., 2015] dataset. In particular, we analyze the effectiveness of the different distance metrics, explicit usage of 𝐱i−𝐱jsubscript𝐱𝑖subscript𝐱𝑗\mathbf{x}_{i}-\mathbf{x}_{j}, and more points.
items.zh: 我们还在ModelNet40 [Wu等人，2015]数据集上实验了模型的各种设置。特别地，我们分析了不同距离度量、显式使用𝐱_i−𝐱_j以及更多点的有效性。

items.en: We also experiment with different numbers k𝑘k of nearest neighbors as shown in Table 5. For all experiments, the number of points is still 1024. While we do not exhaustively experiment with all possible k𝑘k, we find with large k𝑘k that the performance degenerates. This confirms our hypothesis that for certain density, with large k𝑘k the Euclidean distance fails to approximate geodesic distance, destroying the geometry of each patch.
items.zh: 我们还实验了不同数量的最近邻k，如表5所示。在所有实验中，点的数量仍为1024。虽然我们没有穷尽所有可能的k进行实验，但我们发现当k较大时性能下降。这证实了我们的假设：对于特定密度，当k较大时，欧氏距离无法近似测地距离，从而破坏了每个块的几何结构。

items.en: We further evaluate the robustness of our model (trained on 1,024 points with k=20𝑘20k=20) to point cloud density. We simulate the environment that random input points drops out during testing. Figure 5 shows that even half of points is dropped, the model still achieves reasonable results. With fewer than 512 points, however, performance degenerates dramatically.
items.zh: 我们进一步评估了模型（在1024个点、k=20下训练）对点云密度的鲁棒性。我们模拟了测试时随机输入点丢失的环境。图5显示，即使一半的点丢失，模型仍能取得合理的结果。然而，当点数少于512时，性能急剧下降。

items.capEn: Figure 5. Left: Results of our model tested with random input dropout. The model is trained with number of points being 1024 and k𝑘k being 20. Right: Point clouds with different number of points. The numbers of points are shown below the bottom row.
items.capZh: 图5. 左：我们的模型在随机输入丢失测试下的结果。模型训练时点数为1024，k为20。右：不同点数的点云。点数显示在底部行下方。

items.capEn: Figure 6. Our part segmentation testing results for tables, chairs and lamps.
items.capZh: 图6. 我们的桌子、椅子和灯的部分分割测试结果。

items.en: We extend our EdgeConv model architectures for part segmentation task on ShapeNet part dataset [Yi et al., 2016]. For this task, each point from a point cloud set is classified into one of a few predefined part category labels. The dataset contains 16,881 3D shapes from 16 object categories, annotated with 50 parts in total. 2,048 points are sampled from each training shape, and most sampled point sets are labeled with less than six parts. We follow the official train//validation//test split scheme as Chang et al. [2015] in our experiment.
items.zh: 我们将EdgeConv模型架构扩展到ShapeNet零件数据集[Yi等人，2016]上的零件分割任务。对于此任务，点云集中的每个点被分类为几个预定义的零件类别标签之一。该数据集包含来自16个对象类别的16,881个3D形状，总共标注了50个零件。从每个训练形状中采样2,048个点，大多数采样点集被标记为少于六个零件。我们在实验中遵循Chang等人[2015]的官方训练/验证/测试划分方案。

items.en: The network architecture is illustrated in Figure 3 (bottom branch). After a spatial transformer network, three EdgeConv layers are used. A shared fully-connected layer (1024)1024(1024) aggregates information from the previous layers. Shortcut connections are used to include all the EdgeConv outputs as local feature descriptors. At last, three shared fully-connected layers (256,256,128)256256128(256,256,128) are used to transform the pointwise features. Batch-norm, dropout, and ReLU are included in the similar fashion to our classification network.
items.zh: 网络架构如图3（下分支）所示。在空间变换网络之后，使用了三个EdgeConv层。一个共享的全连接层（1024）聚合来自前几层的信息。使用快捷连接将所有EdgeConv输出作为局部特征描述符包含在内。最后，使用三个共享的全连接层（256,256,128）来转换逐点特征。批归一化、dropout和ReLU以类似于分类网络的方式包含在内。

items.en: The same training setting as in our classification task is adopted. A distributed training scheme is further implemented on two NVIDIA TITAN X GPUs to maintain the training batch size.
items.zh: 采用与分类任务相同的训练设置。进一步在两个NVIDIA TITAN X GPU上实现了分布式训练方案以维持训练批次大小。

items.en: We use Intersection-over-Union (IoU) on points to evaluate our model and compare with other benchmarks. We follow the same evaluation scheme as PointNet: The IoU of a shape is computed by averaging the IoUs of different parts occurring in that shape, and the IoU of a category is obtained by averaging the IoUs of all the shapes belonging to that category. The mean IoU (mIoU) is finally calculated by averaging the IoUs of all the testing shapes. We compare our results with PointNet [Qi et al., 2017b], PointNet++ [Qi et al., 2017c], Kd-Net [Klokov and Lempitsky, 2017], LocalFeatureNet [Shen et al., 2017], PCNN [Atzmon et al., 2018], and PointCNN [Li et al., 2018a]. The evaluation results are shown in Table 6. We also visually compare the results of our model and PointNet in Figure 7. More examples are shown in Figure 6.
items.zh: 我们使用点的交并比（IoU）来评估我们的模型并与其他基准进行比较。我们遵循与PointNet相同的评估方案：一个形状的IoU通过平均该形状中出现的不同零件的IoU来计算，一个类别的IoU通过平均属于该类别的所有形状的IoU来获得。最终通过平均所有测试形状的IoU来计算平均IoU（mIoU）。我们将我们的结果与PointNet [Qi等人，2017b]、PointNet++ [Qi等人，2017c]、Kd-Net [Klokov和Lempitsky，2017]、LocalFeatureNet [Shen等人，2017]、PCNN [Atzmon等人，2018]和PointCNN [Li等人，2018a]进行比较。评估结果如表6所示。我们还在图7中直观地比较了我们的模型和PointNet的结果。更多示例见图6。

items.en: We next explore the relationships between different point clouds captured using our features. As shown in Figure 8, we take one red point from a source point cloud and compute its distance in feature space to points in other point clouds from the same category. An interesting finding is that although points are from different sources, they are close to each other if they are from semantically similar parts. We evaluate on the features after the third layer of our segmentation model for this experiment.
items.zh: 接下来，我们探索使用我们的特征捕获的不同点云之间的关系。如图8所示，我们从源点云中取一个红点，并计算其在特征空间中与来自同一类别的其他点云中点的距离。一个有趣的发现是，尽管点来自不同的源，但如果它们来自语义相似的部分，它们彼此接近。我们在此实验中使用分割模型第三层后的特征进行评估。

items.en: Our model is robust to partial data. We simulate the environment that part of the shape is dropped from one of six sides (top, bottom, right, left, front and back) with different percentages. The results are shown in Figure 9. On the left, the mean IoU versus “keep ratio” is shown. On the right, the results for an airplane model are visualized.
items.zh: 我们的模型对部分数据具有鲁棒性。我们模拟了形状的一部分从六个侧面（上、下、右、左、前和后）之一以不同百分比丢失的环境。结果如图9所示。左侧显示了平均IoU与“保留比率”的关系。右侧显示了一个飞机模型的结果可视化。

items.capEn: Figure 7. Compare part segmentation results. For each set, from left to right: PointNet, ours and ground truth.
items.capZh: 图7. 比较部分分割结果。每组从左到右：PointNet、我们的和真实标注。

items.capEn: Figure 8. Visualize the Euclidean distance (yellow: near, blue: far) between source points (red points in the left column) and multiple point clouds from the same category in the feature space after the third EdgeConv layer. Notice source points not only capture semantically similar structures in the point clouds that they belong to, but also capture semantically similar structures in other point clouds from the same category.
items.capZh: 图8. 可视化源点（左列中的红点）与来自同一类别的多个点云在第三个EdgeConv层后的特征空间中的欧氏距离（黄色：近，蓝色：远）。注意源点不仅捕获了它们所属点云中的语义相似结构，还捕获了来自同一类别的其他点云中的语义相似结构。

items.capEn: Figure 9. Left: The mean IoU (%) improves when the ratio of kept points increases. Points are dropped from one of six sides (top, bottom, left, right, front and back) randomly during evaluation process. Right: Part segmentation results on partial data. Points on each row are dropped from the same side. The keep ratio is shown below the bottom row. Note that the segmentation results of turbines are improved when more points are included.
items.capZh: 图9. 左：平均IoU（%）随着保留点比例的增加而提高。在评估过程中，点从六个侧面（上、下、左、右、前和后）之一随机丢失。右：部分数据上的部分分割结果。每行上的点从同一侧面丢失。保留比率显示在底部行下方。注意，当包含更多点时，涡轮机的分割结果得到改善。

items.capEn: Figure 10. Semantic segmentation results. From left to right: PointNet, ours, ground truth and point cloud with original color. Notice our model outputs smoother segmentation results, for example, wall (cyan) in top two rows, chairs (red) and columns (magenta) in bottom two rows.
items.capZh: 图10. 语义分割结果。从左到右：PointNet、我们的、真实标注和原始颜色的点云。注意我们的模型输出更平滑的分割结果，例如，顶部两行中的墙壁（青色），底部两行中的椅子（红色）和柱子（品红色）。

items.en: We evaluate our model on Stanford Large-Scale 3D Indoor Spaces Dataset (S3DIS) [Armeni et al., 2016] for a semantic scene segmentation task. This dataset includes 3D scan point clouds for 6 indoor areas including 272 rooms in total. Each point belongs to one of 13 semantic categories—e.g. board, bookcase, chair, ceiling, and beam—plus clutter. We follow the same setting as Qi et al. [2017b], where each room is split into blocks with area 1​m×1​m1𝑚1𝑚1m\times 1m, and each point is represented as a 9D vector (XYZ, RGB, and normalized spatial coordinates). 4,096 points are sampled for each block during training process, and all points are used for testing. We also use the same 6-fold cross validation over the 6 areas, and the average evaluation results are reported.
items.zh: 我们在Stanford大规模3D室内空间数据集（S3DIS）[Armeni等人，2016]上评估我们的模型，用于语义场景分割任务。该数据集包括6个室内区域的3D扫描点云，总共272个房间。每个点属于13个语义类别之一——例如，板、书柜、椅子、天花板和梁——加上杂乱。我们遵循与Qi等人[2017b]相同的设置，其中每个房间被分割成面积为1m×1m的块，每个点表示为9D向量（XYZ、RGB和归一化空间坐标）。训练过程中为每个块采样4,096个点，测试时使用所有点。我们还对6个区域使用相同的6折交叉验证，并报告平均评估结果。

items.en: The model used for this task is similar to part segmentation model, except that a probability distribution over semantic object classes is generated for each input point and no categorical vector is used here. We compare our model with both PointNet [Qi et al., 2017b] and PointNet baseline, where additional point features (local point density, local curvature and normal) are used to construct handcrafted features and then fed to an MLP classifier. We further compare our work with [Engelmann et al., 2017] and PointCNN [Li et al., 2018a]. Engelmann et al. [2017] present network architectures to enlarge the receptive field over the 3D scene. Two different approaches are proposed in their work: MS+CU for multi-scale block features with consolidation units; G+RCU for the grid-blocks with recurrent consolidation Units. We report evaluation results in Table 7, and visually compare the results of PointNet and our model in Figure 10.
items.zh: 用于此任务的模型与零件分割模型类似，不同之处在于为每个输入点生成语义对象类别的概率分布，并且此处不使用类别向量。我们将我们的模型与PointNet [Qi等人，2017b]和PointNet基线进行比较，其中使用额外的点特征（局部点密度、局部曲率和法线）构建手工特征，然后输入到MLP分类器。我们进一步将我们的工作与[Engelmann等人，2017]和PointCNN [Li等人，2018a]进行比较。Engelmann等人[2017]提出了扩大3D场景感受野的网络架构。他们的工作提出了两种不同的方法：用于多尺度块特征与合并单元的MS+CU；用于网格块与循环合并单元的G+RCU。我们在表7中报告评估结果，并在图10中直观比较PointNet和我们的模型的结果。

items.en: In this work we propose a new operator for learning on point cloud and show its performance on various tasks. Our model suggests that local geometric features are important to 3D recognition tasks, even after introducing machinery from deep learning.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于点云学习的新算子，并展示了它在各种任务上的性能。我们的模型表明，即使在引入深度学习机制后，局部几何特征对于3D识别任务仍然重要。

items.en: While our architectures easily can be incorporated as-is into existing pipelines for point cloud-based graphics, learning, and vision, our experiments also indicate several avenues for future research and extension. Some details of our implementation could be revised and/or re-engineered to improve efficiency or scalability, e.g. incorporating fast data structures rather than computing pairwise distances to evaluate k𝑘k-nearest neighbors queries. We also could consider higher-order relationships between larger tuples of points, rather than considering them pairwise. Another possible extension is to design a non-shared transformer network that works on each local patch differently, adding flexibility to our model.
items.zh: 虽然我们的架构可以轻松地按原样集成到现有的基于点云的图形、学习和视觉流水线中，但我们的实验也指出了未来研究和扩展的几个方向。我们实现的一些细节可以修改和/或重新设计以提高效率或可扩展性，例如，使用快速数据结构而不是计算成对距离来评估k近邻查询。我们还可以考虑点之间更大元组的高阶关系，而不是成对考虑。另一个可能的扩展是设计一个非共享的变换网络，对每个局部块进行不同处理，为我们的模型增加灵活性。

items.en: Our experiments suggest that intrinsic features can be equally valuable if not more valuable than point coordinates; developing a practical and theoretically-justified framework for balancing intrinsic and extrinsic considerations in a learning pipeline will require insight from theory and practice in geometry processing. Given this, we will consider applications of our techniques to more abstract point clouds coming from applications like document retrieval and image processing rather than 3D geometry; beyond broadening the applicability of our technique, these experiments will provide insight into the role of geometry in abstract data processing.
items.zh: 我们的实验表明，内在特征可能与点坐标同样有价值，甚至更有价值；开发一个实用且理论合理的框架来平衡学习流水线中的内在和外在因素，将需要几何处理领域的理论和实践见解。鉴于此，我们将考虑将我们的技术应用于来自文档检索和图像处理等应用的更抽象的点云，而不是3D几何；除了拓宽我们技术的适用性外，这些实验还将为几何在抽象数据处理中的作用提供见解。
